data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for expense capture (meals, lodging for out-of-town work). However, the evidence provided does not include any specific API reads or checks that confirm this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions various needs, including expense capture, but there is no evidence of implementation or validation for this specific requirement, indicating a gap.
gaps: No evidence of expense capture for meals and lodging being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence for expense capture
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the implementation of expense capture for meals and lodging.
